children.text: for investment purposes only and not for the active conduct of a business,
for the joint production, extraction, or use of property, but not for the purpose of selling services or property produced or extracted, or
by dealers in securities for a short period for the purpose of underwriting, selling, or distributing a particular issue of securities,

children.heading: Partner
children.label: b Partner
children.text: For purposes of this subtitle, the term “partner” means a member of a partnership. In the case of a capital interest in a partnership in which capital is a material income-producing factor, whether a person is a partner with respect to such interest shall be determined without regard to whether such interest was derived by gift from any other person.

children.heading: Partnership agreement
children.label: c Partnership agreement
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, a partnership agreement includes any modifications of the partnership agreement made prior to, or at, the time prescribed by law for the filing of the partnership return for the taxable year (not including extensions) which are agreed to by all the partners, or which are adopted in such other manner as may be provided by the partnership agreement.

children.heading: Liquidation of a partner’s interest
children.label: d Liquidation of a partner’s interest
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “liquidation of a partner’s interest” means the termination of a partner’s entire interest in a partnership by means of a distribution, or a series of distributions, to the partner by the partnership.

children.heading: Distributions of partnership interests treated as exchanges
children.label: e Distributions of partnership interests treated as exchanges

children.text: section 743 (relating to optional adjustment to basis of partnership property), and
any other provision of this subchapter specified in regulations prescribed by the Secretary,

children.label: A
children.text: such joint venture shall not be treated as a partnership,

children.label: B
children.text: all items of income, gain, loss, deduction, and credit shall be divided between the spouses in accordance with their respective interests in the venture, and

children.label: C
children.text: each spouse shall take into account such spouse’s respective share of such items as if they were attributable to a trade or business conducted by such spouse as a sole proprietor.

children.label: A
children.text: the only members of such joint venture are a husband and wife,

children.label: B
children.text: both spouses materially participate (within the meaning of section 469(h) without regard to paragraph (5) thereof) in such trade or business, and

children.label: C
children.text: both spouses elect the application of this subsection.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: g Cross reference
children.text: For rules in the case of the sale, exchange, liquidation, or reduction of a partner’s interest, see sections 704(b) and 706(c)(2).
